description: A staff member reports a large water spill on the floor of a main hallway, creating a slip hazard.

nodes.task_description: Gather the exact location of the hazard.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the building and floor number.

nodes.task_description: Create a high-priority cleanup request for the custodial services team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates an urgent work order.

nodes.task_description: Contact campus safety to secure the area with warning signs until custodial arrives.

expected_outcome.value: Agent dispatches security to prevent accidents.
